226.reason: [Error: When encountering "*/" to end a block comment, the function returns prematurely without processing the remaining characters after the comment, causing subsequent tokens to be missed. 233.reason: The lookahead character 'c' (which is the first digit of the next number, e.g., '1' from '10') has been consumed by getChar() but not retracted. This causes the lexer to skip the first digit of the following integer constant. A retract() call is needed here.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The lookahead character 'c' (which is the first digit of the next number, e.g., '1' from '10') has been consumed by getChar() but not retracted. This causes the lexer to skip the first digit of the following integer constant. A retract() call is needed here.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  The character read into 'c' (the first digit of the next number) is not retracted, causing it to be skipped. The next call to next() will start reading from the second digit.
